description:
Run automatic checks after capture/upload for blur, poor exposure, eyes closed, and near-duplicate shots. Flag issues immediately and suggest recapture while participants are still present.

**Rationale:** Quality issues discovered later create rework and unhappy clients. Early detection protects output quality and reduces downstream edits.
title: Photo Quality Gate at Intake
